title: Version mismatch: audit-findings.json says framework_version 6.1, all other configs say 6.0
description: audit-findings.json claims framework_version 6.1 while dispatch-intelligence.json, cache-metrics.json, and token-budget.json all say 6.0. Inconsistency in the version story.
recommended_fix: Align all configs to same version. If 6.1 is the HADF extension, update all configs.

title: framework-manifest.json description still says 'PM framework v5.2'
description: Description field references v5.2 despite framework_version being 6.0.
recommended_fix: Update description to match current version

title: structure.shared_files = 15; actual count is 25
description: The manifest claims 15 shared files but there are now 25 JSON files in .claude/shared/.
recommended_fix: Update the manifest count or auto-compute it

title: model field says claude-opus-4-6 but subagents may run on sonnet
description: token-budget.json records model as claude-opus-4-6 but the tokenizer and actual running model may differ. Misleading attribution.
recommended_fix: Record actual model used or remove model field from token-budget

title: Zero measurements across all fields — no features have ever been measured
description: Despite 8+ completed case studies and multiple framework versions, cache-metrics.json has all zeros. The SKILL.md protocol to update on feature completion has never fired.
recommended_fix: Either run a backfill from existing case study data, or fix the measurement trigger in SKILL.md

title: No framework_version root field — deviates from standard config pattern
description: Most .claude/shared/ configs have a framework_version field. cache-metrics.json does not.
recommended_fix: Add framework_version field

title: chip-profiles.json: 17 profiles — PASS, matches spec
description: HADF Layer 1 validation: correct count.
recommended_fix: None

title: hardware-signature-table.json: 7 signatures — PASS, matches spec
description: HADF Layer 2 validation: correct count.
recommended_fix: None

title: HADF hardware_context: enabled=false, thresholds 0.4/0.7 — PASS
description: HADF integration validation: config matches spec.
recommended_fix: None

title: All skill routing entries verified against actual SKILL.md files — PASS
description: Every entry in skill-routing.json maps to a real SKILL.md file.
recommended_fix: None

title: All cache _index.json files have empty entries[] — cache discovery protocol is broken
description: Skills cannot find cache entries via task_signature lookup because all index files are empty. Cache hits only work when skills hardcode specific file names.
recommended_fix: Fix cache indexing to populate _index.json on write, or switch to directory-scan discovery

title: pm-workflow and dev L1 caches have zero content despite being highest-frequency skills
description: The two most-used skills have empty caches while lower-frequency skills (ux, analytics, qa) have real content.
evidence: Empty L1 for pm-workflow and dev
recommended_fix: Investigate why cache writes are not occurring for these skills

title: No stale cache detected in sampled entries — referenced files exist
description: 5 sampled cache entries all reference files and functions that still exist.
recommended_fix: None

title: No Phase 0 health checks have ever run — history empty, last_check null
description: framework-health.json has history: [], last_check: null. The 25% probability trigger has never fired.
recommended_fix: Investigate probability trigger or run manual health check

title: framework_self_audit section is all null — scaffold never written to
description: The self-audit fields were scaffolded but never populated by any process.
recommended_fix: This audit will populate it — not a bug, just initial state

title: Two in_progress case studies stuck at framework_version 4.3 — 4 major versions behind
description: dispatch-intelligence-v5.2 and parallel-write-safety-v5.2 show as in_progress at v4.3 despite being completed features.
recommended_fix: Update statuses to complete, update framework versions

title: v52-dispatch-log.json not referenced by any SKILL.md or config — dead artifact
description: Orphaned file from v5.2 development, not linked from any active config.
recommended_fix: Archive or delete

title: Chip Affinity Map empty by design — HADF Layer 4 not yet active
description: Expected initial state. Will populate when HADF is enabled.
recommended_fix: None — expected

title: Case study claims 80% prediction accuracy; raw log records 75% — denominator ambiguity
description: The case study narrative reports 80% dispatch prediction accuracy; the raw log computes 75%. Discrepancy is likely a denominator choice (excluding PENDING dispatch).
recommended_fix: Document denominator explicitly in case study

title: Inverted timestamps: dispatch-intelligence started_at later than updated_at
description: dispatch-intelligence-v5.2 has started_at (10:00) later than updated_at (06:30). Logically impossible.
recommended_fix: Fix timestamps or regenerate from git log
